const ANNIVERSARY = new Date("2021-12-14T00:00:00");
const COVER_TITLE = "Our Story";
const COVER_SUBTITLE = "A love worth remembering";

  {

    photos: [

// Wrong-attempt reactions
const WRONG_REACTIONS = [
  { emoji: "🫠", line: null },
  { emoji: "😒", line: null },
  {
    emoji: null,
    paper: true,
    title: "A Gentle Remembrance 🕯️",
    line: `Dost thou not recall that blessed eve\nwhen two souls, trembling with wonder,\ndid first choose one another?\n\n'Twas the fourteenth day of December —\na date etched not upon stone,\nbut upon the very chambers of thine heart.\n\nSeek it there, my love. 🌹`,
  },
  {
    emoji: null,
    paper: true,
    title: "With the Utmost Tenderness 💌",
    line: `My dearest, I shall veil this secret no longer.\n\nThe key thou seekest is 1 · 4 · 1 · 2.\n\nNow prithee, enter and let thine eyes\nbehold what my heart hath made for thee. 🥀`,
  },
];

const css = `
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=Inter:wght@300;400&family=Caveat:wght@400;600&display=swap');

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html, body { height: 100%; }

.root {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background: #0d0508;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  position: relative;
  padding: 20px;
}
.root::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 30% 20%, rgba(160,30,60,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 75% 80%, rgba(100,10,30,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes shake {
  0%,100%{transform:translateX(0) scale(1.15);}
  20%{transform:translateX(-7px) scale(1.15);}
  40%{transform:translateX(7px) scale(1.15);}
  60%{transform:translateX(-4px) scale(1.15);}
  80%{transform:translateX(4px) scale(1.15);}
}
@keyframes breathe {
  0%,100% { opacity:0.35; }
  50%      { opacity:0.75; }
}
@keyframes popIn {
  0%   { transform: scale(0.5); opacity:0; }
  70%  { transform: scale(1.2); }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity:1; }
}
@keyframes paperDrop {
  from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(-30px) rotate(-1deg); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0) rotate(-1deg); }
}
@keyframes turnIn {
  from { opacity:0; transform: perspective(700px) rotateY(30deg) translateX(50px); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform: perspective(700px) rotateY(0deg) translateX(0); }
}
@keyframes turnInBack {
  from { opacity:0; transform: perspective(700px) rotateY(-30deg) translateX(-50px); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform: perspective(700px) rotateY(0deg) translateX(0); }
}

/* ── PIN SCREEN ── */
.pin-screen {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
.pin-icon { font-size: 44px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.pin-title {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 26px; font-style: italic;
  color: #f0cdd4; margin-bottom: 4px; text-align:center;
}
.pin-sub {
  font-size: 12px; color: rgba(240,205,212,0.4);
  letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 28px; font-weight:300;
}

/* reaction emoji */
.reaction-emoji {
  font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 14px;
  animation: popIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) both;
  display: block; text-align: center;
}

/* paper note */
.paper-overlay {
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 100;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  padding: 24px;
  animation: fadeUp 0.3s ease both;
}
.paper {
  background: #fdf8f0;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 32px 28px 28px;
  max-width: 380px; width: 100%;
  transform: rotate(-1deg);
  animation: paperDrop 0.4s ease both;
  position: relative;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}
/* lined paper effect */
.paper::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(
    transparent, transparent 27px, #c8d8e8 27px, #c8d8e8 28px
  );
  border-radius: 4px;
  opacity: 0.5;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.paper-hole {
  position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 20px;
  width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: #0d0508;
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}
.paper-title {
  font-family: 'Caveat', cursive;
  font-size: 22px; color: #8b1a2a;
  margin-bottom: 16px; text-align: center;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.paper-body {
  font-family: 'Caveat', cursive;
  font-size: 17px; color: #2a1a1a;
  line-height: 1.9;
  white-space: pre-line;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
.paper-close {
  margin-top: 20px; width: 100%;
  background: #8b1a2a; color: #fff;
  border: none; border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 12px; font-size: 14px;
  font-family: 'Caveat', cursive;
  font-size: 16px;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}
.paper-close:hover { opacity: 0.85; }

/* dots */
.pin-dots { display: flex; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.pin-dot {
  width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid rgba(240,160,175,0.4);
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
}
.pin-dot.filled { background: #d45070; border-color: #d45070; transform: scale(1.15); }
.pin-dot.error  {
  border-color: #ff5555; background: #ff5555;
  animation: shake 0.4s ease;
}

/* keypad */
.keypad {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 72px);
  grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 72px);
  gap: 12px;
}
.key {
  width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,200,210,0.12);
  color: #f0cdd4; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 300;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.1s;
  user-select: none;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}
.key:hover  { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); }
.key:active { transform: scale(0.91); background: rgba(212,80,112,0.25); }
.key.del    { font-size: 18px; }
.key.empty  { pointer-events: none; background: none; border: none; }

.pin-hint {
  margin-top: 22px; font-size: 12px;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.25);
  letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-align:center;
}

/* ── COVER ── */
.cover-screen {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both;
  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
.book-cover-wrap {
  width: 240px; height: 320px;
  transition: transform 0.35s ease;
}
.cover-screen:hover .book-cover-wrap {
  transform: perspective(700px) rotateY(-10deg) translateX(8px);
}
.book-cover {
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  border-radius: 4px 16px 16px 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #6b1a2a 0%, #3d0a14 50%, #2a0810 100%);
  box-shadow:
    -6px 6px 0 #1a0508,
    -13px 11px 0 #120306,
    -4px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.6),
    inset 0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3),
    0 0 60px rgba(180,30,60,0.15);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.book-cover::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 22px;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #1a0508, #4a1020 40%, transparent);
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,150,170,0.08);
}
.book-cover::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,180,190,0.15);
  border-radius: 2px 12px 12px 2px;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.cover-emblem { font-size: 34px; margin-bottom: 14px; opacity: 0.9; }
.cover-text-title {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600;
  color: #f0cdd4; text-align: center;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  padding: 0 28px; line-height: 1.3;
}
.cover-text-sub {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 13px; font-style: italic;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.5);
  margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px;
}
.cover-year {
  position: absolute; bottom: 26px;
  font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.3); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.tap-hint {
  margin-top: 30px; font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.35); letter-spacing: 1px;
  animation: breathe 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}

/* ── BOOK READER ── */
.book-reader {
  width: min(100vw - 32px, 480px);
  animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both;
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
.reader-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.reader-title {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 30px; font-style: italic; color: #f0cdd4;
}
.reader-sub {
  font-size: 11px; color: rgba(240,205,212,0.35);
  letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 4px;
}

.page-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,180,190,0.1);
  border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden;
}
.page-caption {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 20px; color: #f0cdd4;
  padding: 20px 24px 0; font-style: italic;
}
.photo-grid { display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 16px; }
.grid-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); }
.grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); }
.photo-cell {
  border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
  aspect-ratio: 4/3; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.photo-cell img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block; transition: transform 0.4s ease; }
.photo-cell:hover img { transform: scale(1.05); }

/* Letter page */
.letter-page {
  padding: 24px;
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  color: #f0cdd4;
  line-height: 1.85;
  font-size: 16px;
}
.letter-page p { margin-bottom: 14px; }
.letter-page .letter-salutation {
  font-size: 20px; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.letter-page .letter-sign {
  margin-top: 20px; font-style: italic;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.6); font-size: 15px;
}
.letter-heart {
  text-align: center; font-size: 32px;
  margin: 8px 0 16px;
  animation: breathe 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

/* nav */
.page-nav {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 14px 20px 18px;
}
.nav-btn {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,180,190,0.15);
  border-radius: 50%; width: 44px; height: 44px;
  color: #f0cdd4; font-size: 18px;
  cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.1s;
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}
.nav-btn:hover  { background: rgba(212,80,112,0.2); }
.nav-btn:active { transform: scale(0.9); }
.nav-btn:disabled { opacity:0.2; cursor:default; pointer-events:none; }
.page-indicator { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(240,205,212,0.4); letter-spacing: 1px; }


/* ── COUNTDOWN CLOCK ── */
.clock-wrap {
  padding: 28px 20px 20px;
  text-align: center;
}
.clock-heart {
  font-size: 36px;
  animation: breathe 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.clock-title {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 14px; font-style: italic;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.5);
  letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.clock-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.clock-unit {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,180,190,0.12);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px 6px;
}
.clock-num {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600;
  color: #f0cdd4;
  line-height: 1;
}
.clock-label {
  font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.35);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-top: 4px;
}
.clock-subtitle {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
  font-size: 16px; font-style: italic;
  color: rgba(240,205,212,0.55);
  line-height: 1.7;
}

/* ── GF PAGE ── */
.gf-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 16px;
}
.gf-cell {
  border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden;
  aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.gf-cell img {
  width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position: top;
  display:block;
  transition: transform 0.4s ease;
}
.gf-cell:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); }

/* ── LIGHTBOX ── */
.lightbox-overlay {
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 999;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  animation: fadeUp 0.2s ease both;
  padding: 20px;
}
.lightbox-overlay img {
  max-width: 100%; max-height: 90vh;
  border-radius: 12px;
  object-fit: contain;
  animation: lbPop 0.25s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) both;
  box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
}
@keyframes lbPop {
  from { transform: scale(0.85); opacity: 0; }
  to   { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }
}
.photo-cell { cursor: zoom-in; }
.gf-cell    { cursor: zoom-in; }

.page-entering      { animation: turnIn     0.45s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) both; }
.page-entering-back { animation: turnInBack 0.45s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) both; }
`;

// ── PIN SCREEN ────────────────────────────────────────
function PinScreen({ onSuccess }) {
  const [entered, setEntered]       = useState([]);
  const [isError, setIsError]       = useState(false);
  const [wrongCount, setWrongCount] = useState(0);
  const [showPaper, setShowPaper]   = useState(false);
  const PIN_LEN = PIN.length;

  const currentReaction = wrongCount > 0
    ? WRONG_REACTIONS[Math.min(wrongCount - 1, WRONG_REACTIONS.length - 1)]
    : null;

  const press = (d) => {
    if (isError || showPaper) return;
    const next = [...entered, d];
    setEntered(next);
    if (next.length === PIN_LEN) {
      if (next.join("") === PIN) {
        setTimeout(onSuccess, 300);
      } else {
        setIsError(true);
        const newCount = wrongCount + 1;
        setWrongCount(newCount);
        setTimeout(() => {
          setEntered([]);
          setIsError(false);
          const r = WRONG_REACTIONS[Math.min(newCount - 1, WRONG_REACTIONS.length - 1)];
          if (r && r.paper) setShowPaper(true);
        }, 600);
      }
    }
  };

  const del = () => { if (!isError && !showPaper) setEntered(e => e.slice(0, -1)); };
  const keys = ["1","2","3","4","5","6","7","8","9","","0","⌫"];

  return (
    <>
      {showPaper && (
        <div className="paper-overlay">
          <div className="paper">
            <div className="paper-hole" />
            <div className="paper-title">{currentReaction.title}</div>
            <div className="paper-body">{currentReaction.line}</div>
            <button className="paper-close" onClick={() => setShowPaper(false)}>
              I remember now 🌹
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="pin-screen">
        <div className="pin-icon">🔐</div>
        <h1 className="pin-title">Enter the secret PIN</h1>
        <p className="pin-sub">only you know this</p>

        {currentReaction && currentReaction.emoji && (
          <span key={wrongCount} className="reaction-emoji">{currentReaction.emoji}</span>
        )}

        <div className="pin-dots">
          {Array.from({ length: PIN_LEN }).map((_, i) => (
            <div key={i} className={`pin-dot ${i < entered.length ? (isError ? "error" : "filled") : ""}`} />
          ))}
        </div>

        <div className="keypad">
          {keys.map((k, i) => {
            if (k === "")  return <div key={i} className="key empty" />;
            if (k === "⌫") return <div key={i} className="key del" onClick={del}>{k}</div>;
            return <div key={i} className="key" onClick={() => press(k)}>{k}</div>;
          })}
        </div>
        <p className="pin-hint">Hint: our anniversary date 💕</p>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

// ── COVER ─────────────────────────────────────────────
function CoverScreen({ onOpen }) {
  return (
    <div className="cover-screen" onClick={onOpen}>
      <div className="book-cover-wrap">
        <div className="book-cover">
          <div className="cover-emblem">💌</div>
          <div className="cover-text-title">{COVER_TITLE}</div>
          <div className="cover-text-sub">{COVER_SUBTITLE}</div>
          <div className="cover-year">Made with love</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p className="tap-hint">tap to open</p>
    </div>
  );
}


// ── COUNTDOWN CLOCK ───────────────────────────────────
function CountdownClock() {
  const [time, setTime] = useState(() => calcTime());

  function calcTime() {
    const now = new Date();
    const diff = now - ANNIVERSARY;
    const totalSecs = Math.floor(diff / 1000);
    const years  = Math.floor(diff / (1000*60*60*24*365.25));
    const months = Math.floor((diff % (1000*60*60*24*365.25)) / (1000*60*60*24*30.44));
    const days   = Math.floor((diff % (1000*60*60*24*30.44)) / (1000*60*60*24));
    const hours  = Math.floor((diff % (1000*60*60*24)) / (1000*60*60));
    const mins   = Math.floor((diff % (1000*60*60)) / (1000*60));
    const secs   = Math.floor((diff % (1000*60)) / 1000);
    return { years, months, days, hours, mins, secs };
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    const id = setInterval(() => setTime(calcTime()), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(id);
  }, []);

  const units = [
    { label: "Years",   val: time.years },
    { label: "Months",  val: time.months },
    { label: "Days",    val: time.days },
    { label: "Hours",   val: time.hours },
    { label: "Minutes", val: time.mins },
    { label: "Seconds", val: time.secs },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="clock-wrap">
      <div className="clock-heart">💞</div>
      <div className="clock-title">Together since 14 December 2020</div>
      <div className="clock-grid">
        {units.map(u => (
          <div className="clock-unit" key={u.label}>
            <div className="clock-num">{String(u.val).padStart(2,"0")}</div>
            <div className="clock-label">{u.label}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="clock-subtitle">
        Nearly five years of thee, my love —<br/>and yet it feeleth as though we have only just begun. 🌹
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── LETTER PAGE ───────────────────────────────────────
function LetterPage() {
  return (
    <div className="letter-page">
      <div className="letter-heart">❤️</div>
      <p className="letter-salutation">To my dearest,</p>
      <p>
        In all the years that Providence shall grant me breath upon this earth,
        there shall be no chapter more cherished, no verse more beloved,
        than the one in which thou didst walk into my life and alter it forevermore.
      </p>
      <p>
        I have loved thee quietly in the mornings, and loudly in my heart at night.
        I have loved thee in thy laughter and in thy silence,
        in the ordinary moments that the world deems unremarkable,
        yet to me shine brighter than any star.
      </p>
      <p>
        Know this, my love — I do not merely wish to be beside thee for a season.
        I wish to earn thee, day after day, and to build with thee
        a life so full of warmth and devotion that even time itself
        shall marvel at what we have made.
      </p>
      <p>
        It is mine earnest intention, before God and all the heavens,
        to one day take thy hand and make thee my wife —
        to stand with thee in all things, to protect thy joy as I would guard my own soul,
        and to love thee with a faithfulness that shall not waver nor fade.
      </p>
      <p>
        Thou art my home, my peace, my greatest adventure.
        And I am, most willingly and most joyfully, thine.
      </p>
      <div className="letter-sign">— Always yours, with all that I am 🌹</div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── LIGHTBOX ──────────────────────────────────────────
function Lightbox({ src, onClose }) {
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e) => { if (e.key === "Escape") onClose(); };
    window.addEventListener("keydown", handler);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handler);
  }, []);
  return (
    <div className="lightbox-overlay" onClick={onClose}>
      <img src={src} alt="full view" />
    </div>
  );
}

// ── BOOK READER ───────────────────────────────────────
function BookReader() {
  const [pageIndex, setPageIndex] = useState(0);
  const [animClass, setAnimClass] = useState("page-entering");
  const [lightbox, setLightbox] = useState(null);

  const go = (dir) => {
    const next = pageIndex + dir;
    if (next < 0 || next >= PAGES.length) return;
    setTimeout(() => {
      setPageIndex(next);
      setAnimClass(dir > 0 ? "page-entering" : "page-entering-back");
    }, 10);
    setAnimClass("");
  };

  const page = PAGES[pageIndex];
  const gridClass = page.photos && page.photos.length === 4 ? "grid-4" : "grid-3";

  return (
    <>
      {lightbox && <Lightbox src={lightbox} onClose={() => setLightbox(null)} />}
      <div className="book-reader">
      <div className="reader-header">
        <div className="reader-title">{COVER_TITLE}</div>
        <div className="reader-sub">{COVER_SUBTITLE}</div>
      </div>

      <div key={pageIndex} className={`page-card ${animClass}`}>
        <div className="page-caption">{page.caption}</div>

        {page.letter ? (
          <>
            <LetterPage />
            <CountdownClock />
          </>
        ) : page.gfPage ? (
          <div className="gf-grid">
            {page.photos.map((src, i) => (
              <div className="gf-cell" key={i} onClick={() => setLightbox(src)}>
                <img src={src} alt={`her ${i + 1}`} />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className={`photo-grid ${gridClass}`}>
            {page.photos.map((src, i) => (
              <div className="photo-cell" key={i} onClick={() => setLightbox(src)}>
                <img src={src} alt={`memory ${i + 1}`} />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="page-nav">
          <button className="nav-btn" onClick={() => go(-1)} disabled={pageIndex === 0}>‹</button>
          <span className="page-indicator">{pageIndex + 1} / {PAGES.length}</span>
          <button className="nav-btn" onClick={() => go(1)} disabled={pageIndex === PAGES.length - 1}>›</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    </>
  );
}

// ── APP ───────────────────────────────────────────────
export default function App() {
  const [stage, setStage] = useState("pin");
  return (
    <>
      <style>{css}</style>
      <div className="root">
        {stage === "pin"   && <PinScreen   onSuccess={() => setStage("cover")} />}
        {stage === "cover" && <CoverScreen onOpen={()    => setStage("book")}  />}
        {stage === "book"  && <BookReader />}
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
